vit_dr.description: Tailor gate passes (LLM verdict=pass) on round 0 and 1, but final_review_gate emits revise → routes to evidence_context → tailor_skill_adapter → tailor_gate. Round_idx is already 2 (=MAX_ROUNDS), so tailor_gate immediately emits unresolved via rule cap. fused_verdict=BLOCKED.
vit_dr.root_cause: No input fingerprint check to reuse a gate's previous pass verdict when the input state has not changed.

xlm_r.description: Seed S1 (BERT) title mismatch: case specifies 'BERT: Pre-training...' but SeedResolver resolves to the BERT paper and marks as ambiguous because Crossref returns a different title.

yolo_steel.description: Seed S2 (Song/Yan steel defect detection) lacks stable identifier (DOI/arXiv). Author+year+title search produces multiple candidates. remains ambiguous after SeedResolver.
